entry.title: Java笔记
entry.content:
Day16

1、ArrayList

package day16.cn.itcast_01;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Iterator;public class ArrayListDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        ArrayList array = new ArrayList();        array.add("hello");        array.add("world");        array.add("java");        Iterator it = array.iterator();        while(it.hasNext()){            String s = (String) it.next();            System.out.println(s);        }        for (int x = 0 ;x < array.size();x++){            String s = (String) array.get(x);            System.out.println(s);        }    }}
package day16.cn.itcast_01;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Iterator;public class ArrayListDemo2 {    public static void main(String[] args) {        ArrayList array = new ArrayList();        Student s1 = new Student("林青霞", 27);        Student s2 = new Student("风清扬", 30);        Student s3 = new Student("令狐冲", 33);        Student s4 = new Student("武鑫", 25);        Student s5 = new Student("刘晓曲", 22);        array.add(s1);        array.add(s2);        array.add(s3);        array.add(s4);        array.add(s5);        Iterator it = array.iterator();        while (it.hasNext()){            Student s = (Student) it.next();            System.out.println(s.getName()+"----"+s.getAge());        }        for (int x = 0;x < array.size();x++){            Student s = (Student) array.get(x);            System.out.println(s.getName()+"----"+s.getAge());        }    }}

2、Vector类

package day16.cn.itcast_02;import java.util.Enumeration;import java.util.Vector;/*Vector的特有功能：1:添加功能public void addElement (object obj)  --add2:获取功能public object elementAt (int index)  --getpublic Enumeration elements()   --Iteratorboolean hasMoreElements ()   hasNext ()object nextElement ()    next () */public class VectorDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        Vector v = new Vector();        v.addElement("hello");        v.addElement("world");        String s = (String) v.elementAt(1);        System.out.println(s);        //和迭代器很像        Enumeration en = v.elements();        while(en.hasMoreElements()){            String s1 = (String) en.nextElement();            System.out.println(s1);        }    }}

3、LinkedList

package day16.cn.itcast_03;import java.util.Iterator;import java.util.LinkedList;/*LinkedList的特有功能：A:添加功能public void addFirst (object e)public void addLast (object e)B:获取功能public object getFirst ()public obejct getLast()C:移除功能public object removeFirst ()public object removeLast () */public class LinkedListDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {       LinkedList l = new LinkedList();        l.add("hello");        l.add("world");        l.addFirst("java");        l.addLast("javaee");        Iterator i = l.iterator();        while(i.hasNext()){            String s = (String) i.next();            System.out.println(s);        }    }}
public object removeFirst ()public object removeLast ()    返回值为移除的内容

4、泛型

泛型：是一种把类型明确的工作推迟到仓创建对象或著调用方法的时候才去明确的特殊的类型。

参数化类型，把类型当作参数传递

好处：
A:把运行时的问题提前到了编泽明间
B:避免了强制类型转换
C:忧化了程序设计，解决了董色警告锡

package day16.cn.itcast_06;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Iterator;public class ArrayListDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        ArrayList<String> array = new ArrayList<String>();        array.add("hello");        array.add("world");        array.add("java");        //array.add(10); 报错        Iterator<String> it = array.iterator();        while (it.hasNext()){            String s = it.next();            System.out.println(s);        }        System.out.println("--------------");        for(int  x = 0;x < array.size();x++){            String s = array.get(x);            System.out.println(s);        }    }}
package day16.cn.itcast_06;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Iterator;public class ArrayListDemo2 {    public static void main(String[] args) {        ArrayList<Student> array = new ArrayList<Student>();        Student s1 = new Student("林青霞", 27);        Student s2 = new Student("风清扬", 30);        Student s3 = new Student("令狐冲", 33);        Student s4 = new Student("武鑫", 25);        Student s5 = new Student("刘晓曲", 22);        array.add(s1);        array.add(s2);        array.add(s3);        array.add(s4);        array.add(s5);        Iterator<Student> it = array.iterator();        while (it.hasNext()){            Student s = it.next();            System.out.println(s.getName()+"------"+s.getAge());        }    }}

4.1泛型定义在类上

泛型类
·把泛型定义在类上
格式：public class类名<泛型类型1，>
·注意：泛型类型必须是引用类型
泛型方法
·把泛型定义在方法上
·格式：public心泛型类型>返回类型方法名（泛型类型.）
泛型接口
把泛型定义在接口上

package day16.cn.itcast_09;public class ObjectTool<T>{//    public void  show(String s){//        System.out.println(s);//    }////    public void  show(Integer i){//        System.out.println(i);//    }    public void  show(T t){        System.out.println(t);    }}

4.2泛型方法：

public <T> void show(T t){    sout(t)}

4.3泛型接口

package day16.cn.itcast_10;/*泛型定义在接口上 */public interface Inter<T> {    public abstract void show(T t);}
package day16.cn.itcast_10;/*实现接口已经知道是什么类型未知类型 *///public class InterImp implements Inter<String>{//    public void show(String s){//        System.out.println(s);//    }//}public class InterImp<T> implements Inter<T>{        public void show(T t){        System.out.println(t);    }}
package day16.cn.itcast_10;public class InterImpDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        Inter<String> i = new InterImp();        i.show("hello");        Inter<Integer> i2 = new InterImp<Integer>();        i2.show(100);    }}

4.4泛型通配符

泛型明确写的时候必须一致

5、增强For

记得判空

其实就是迭代器

package day16.cn.itcast_11;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Iterator;public class ArrayListDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        ArrayList<String> array = new ArrayList<String>();        array.add("hello");        array.add("world");        array.add("java");        Iterator<String> it = array.iterator();        while (it.hasNext()){            String s = it.next();            System.out.println(s);        }        for(int y = 0;y < array.size();y++){            System.out.println(array.get(y));        }        for(String x : array){            System.out.println(x);        }    }}

5、静态导入

注意事项：方法必须是静态的才能导入

一般不用，可以看懂即可

package day16.cn.itcast_12;import java.lang.Math;import static java.lang.Math.abs;public class StaticImportDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        System.out.println(Math.abs(-100));        System.out.println(Math.pow(2,3));        System.out.println(Math.max(20,30));        System.out.println(abs(-100));    }}

6、可变参数

可变参数格式

package day16.cn.itcast_13;import java.util.Arrays;import java.util.List;/*public static<T> List<T> asList(T... a):把数组转成集合，可变参数 */public class ArrayDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        String[] strArray = {"hello","world","java"};        List<String> list = Arrays.asList(strArray);        //list.add,list.remove ， 报错不支持的操作        //但是可以list.set()，其本质还是一个数组，只要不改变长度的操作都可以做        for(String s : list){            System.out.println(s);        }    }}

7、集合的嵌套遍历

package day16.cn.itcast_13;import java.util.ArrayList;/*集合的嵌套遍历需求：我们班有学生，每一个学生是不是一个对象。所以我们可以使用一个集合表示我们班级的学生，A工上yLis七<S七u但是呢，我们磨边是不是还有班级，每个班级是不是也是一个ArrayList<Student>。而我现在有多个ArrayList<Student>。也要用集合存储，怎么办呢？就是这个样子的：ArrayList<ArrayList<student>> */public class ArrayListDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        //创建大集合        ArrayList<ArrayList<Student>> bigArrayList = new ArrayList<ArrayList<Student>>();        ArrayList<Student> firstArray = new ArrayList<Student>();        Student s1 = new Student("林青霞", 27);        Student s2 = new Student("风清扬", 30);        Student s3 = new Student("令狐冲", 33);        Student s4 = new Student("武鑫", 25);        Student s5 = new Student("刘晓曲", 22);        firstArray.add(s1);        firstArray.add(s2);        firstArray.add(s3);        firstArray.add(s4);        firstArray.add(s5);        bigArrayList.add(firstArray);        //创健第三个班级的学生集合        ArrayList<Student> thirdArrayList = new ArrayList<Student>();        //创健学生        Student s111 = new Student("宋江",40);        Student s222 = new Student("吴用",35);        Student s333 = new Student("高俅",30);        Student s444 = new Student("lisisi",26);        //学生进班        thirdArrayList.add(s111);        thirdArrayList.add(s222);        thirdArrayList.add(s333);        thirdArrayList.add(s444);        bigArrayList.add(thirdArrayList);        for(ArrayList<Student> array : bigArrayList){            for(Student s : array){                System.out.println(s.getName()+"-----"+s.getAge());            }        }    }}
package day16.cn.itcast_13;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Random;public class RandomDemo {    public static void main(String[] args) {        Random r = new Random();        ArrayList<Integer> array = new ArrayList<>();        int count = 0 ;        while(count < 10){            int num = r.nextInt(20) + 1;            if(!array.contains(num)){                array.add(num);                count++;            }        }        for(Integer i : array){            System.out.println(i);        }    }}
package day16.cn.itcast_13;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.Arrays;import java.util.Scanner;public class ArraylistDemo2 {    public static void main(String[] args) {        Scanner sc = new Scanner(System.in);        ArrayList<Integer> array = new ArrayList<Integer>();        while (true){            System.out.println("请输入数据:");            int number = sc.nextInt();            if(number != 0){                array.add(number);            }else {                break;            }        }        //把集合转为数组        Integer[] i =  new Integer[array.size()];        array.toArray(i);        Arrays.sort(i);        System.out.println(i[i.length - 1]);    }}
entry.summary: Day16

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
entry.summary: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for
